calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Of Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Baron Miller for Wayne Liao.

Mr. Miller adressed the issue of bond and language in the special needs trust with regard to the Trustee's power to invest. The Petition for Order of Modification of Trust was taken under submission for the Court to take another look at the terms of the trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
